creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
vm_pgcache is just a cache used by the page allocator, it doesn't consume memory on its own and won't be the source of leaks.

However, the output seems to suggest that taskq zone has a large number of pending allocations.  Could you please show the unmodified "vmstat -z" output?  If you run "top -SHz" for a few seconds, do you see a thread called "arc_prune" consuming 100% of a core?
